strengths: Extensive full-stack experience (8+ years) with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, directly matching the primary stack (e.g., Optilyz, re:cinq roles).
Proven track record in building scalable systems (e.g., micro-services at Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP requests/sec, AWS CDK at Optilyz).
Strong open-source contributions and AI-agent development (e.g., GISCollective, MCP code generators at re:cinq), aligning with enterprise tooling needs.
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js (primary backend framework) or Vitest (testing framework) in résumé, despite broad testing expertise.
No direct evidence of Kotlin/Java experience (secondary backend requirement) in recent roles; Dlang and Swift dominate older projects.
German language skills are basic, which may impact collaboration in a Berlin-based team.
response.justification: The candidate demonstrates deep full-stack expertise with TypeScript/Node.js/React (e.g., Optilyz, re:cinq) and scalable system design (Sociomantic), directly addressing core responsibilities. Open-source contributions (GISCollective) and AI-agent work (re:cinq) align with internal tooling needs. However, Nest.js/Vitest exposure is unconfirmed, and Kotlin/Java experience is outdated (pre-2020). While German proficiency is basic, English fluency mitigates collaboration risks.
